Golden Ticket Event - Week 2

It’s time for Week 2 of the Golden Ticket Event!   

This week is all about utility! Submit tickets and have a chance at winning Claim Stakes, Armstrong ships, and more. 

Submit tickets by November 10 / 3:15PM ET. 

 https://hedgehog.markets/star-atlas
